text.message: Dont think ive ever seen such good spots in 4th 😂😂
I’ll do that on your turn red
Idk why you keep stealing from me
That was my first steal. Not personal
lol it’s only been moved 3 times and I’m pretty sure black got robbed
I have picked up no wood and 3 brick somehow
There shouldn’t be as much brick as there is lol
It might be rolling more than 6
lol the games over I don’t think anyone’s catching up
Unfortunately the robber has been on me constantly
You got road in hand red?
Idk they got 3 d cards and they haven’t been playing any
Man and they do that mid play
lol imagine if you had the mono still
I can take road with 2 brick
